metadata.task_title: Search for a product on an online store
metadata.instruction: Visit walmart.com on Chrome. Search for a frying pan, then click on the first product with a pan size of exactly 10 inches and add it to cart.
metadata.context: I've been getting into cooking recently, so I've decided to upgrade my frying pan.

tabs.title: Blue Diamond Toxin Free Ceramic Nonstick Safe Open Frypan/Skillet, 10" - Walmart.com

l3.rationale: Clicked the Google Chrome list item in Program Manager to launch Chrome.

l4.rationale: Launched Google Chrome from Program Manager and dismissed the restore-pages prompt to get into the browser app.

l5.rationale: Starts the browser application and dismisses the initial prompt, setting up Chrome for the Walmart visit.
